name: actionRendererWidget
title: Action Renderer
subTitle: Run a connector action or playbook with Jinja-templated params and render the output as raw JSON, a table, or a Jinja template.

metadata.description: Configure a connector action or playbook on the edit panel; the widget executes it on the view panel against the current record (params can use Jinja for record-aware values) and renders the output as raw JSON, a table you shape with a JSON-path picker, or HTML produced by an inline Jinja template.
